teaching_deltas.learned: Completed tasks need a GitHub-safe post-work bundle index, manifest, receipt index, file delta index, and structural admission checker.
Bundle checks must be runnable using existing tooling and must not require package installation for V0.1.
Remote proof cannot be faked before push; self-reference boundaries must be explicit.
Narrow organ matrix audit can verify nine required receipts without claiming full authority.
Every completed task should carry a next recommended task route.
